arts.ttl: Young midfielder departs Colchester United to sign for League of Ireland side
arts.sum: He has now returned to Northern Ireland and boss Colchester boss Danny Cowley believes it will be a good move for the versatile youngster. Thompson joined Forest when he was 16 after impressing for Northern Irish side Crusaders and spent two years at the City Ground club.

arts.ttl: New Carlisle United signing Dennis's goal highlights
arts.sum: WATCH: See footage of new Blues frontman Matt Dennis in goalscoring form for his previous clubs.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United coach quits - as Blues appoint replacement
arts.sum: Carlisle United have moved quickly to replace goalkeeping coach Tom Weal who has left the club for a reported move to Sunderland.

arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Newport game!
arts.sum: GALLERY: Check out our fan photos after 271 Carlisle United supporters made the long midweek trip to south Wales.

arts.ttl: Preview: Carlisle United vs. Colchester United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Carlisle United and Colchester United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United loan star announces retirement
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United loan star James Chester has announced his retirement at 36.

arts.ttl: Hughes on whether Carlisle United could sign another free agent
arts.sum: Mark Hughes has played down the likelihood of yet another free agent coming to Carlisle United’s rescue.
